theory.canonical_statement: Assuming a prior probability of 0.05 for the gyromagnetic genesis hypothesis and a likelihood of about 0.047 based on twelve independent observables, the posterior probability is approximately 0.71.
theory.technical_interpretation: Assuming a prior probability of 0.05 for the gyromagnetic genesis hypothesis and a likelihood of about 0.047 based on twelve independent observables, the posterior probability is approximately 0.71.

canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
\Phi = n\Phi_0 = n\frac{h}{2e} \approx n \times 2.07 \times 10^{-15} \text{ Wb}
\]
\[
S = |E(\theta_1, \theta_2) - E(\theta_1, \theta_2')| + |E(\theta_1', \theta_2) + E(\theta_1', \theta_2')| > 2
\]
